title: NewestPlusPlus
description: A Fabric Vanilla+ Modpack on the latest version of Minecraft
body:
# What is NewestPlusPlus?

NewestPlusPlus is a Vanilla+ Modpack based on the latest version of Minecraft (1.21 as of writing)

This modpack is based on [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive/version/1.29.1+1.21.fabric), which is a performace Modpack

# Features

- End Update with new biomes
- Sound Physics
- Voice Chat
- World Hosting
- New Biomes
- New Block Variants
- Waystones for easy teleportation
- Nature Compass for finding Biomes
